questionText: Provide details of your organization's low-carbon heat, steam, and cooling purchases in the reporting year by country/area.
questionKo: 보고 연도에 귀사의 재생 가능 전력 구매에 대한 국가/지역별 세부 정보를 제공하십시오
sectorTags: Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: Providing details of low-carbon heat, steam and cooling purchases by country/area provides data users with a more complete picture of an organization's low carbon and renewable energy consumption.

columns.text: Country/area of consumption of low-carbon heat, steam or cooling
options: South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
columns.textKo: 국가/지역 의 소비 의 저탄소 열, 스팀 또는 냉방

columns.text: Low-carbon heat, steam, or cooling consumed (MWh)
columns.textKo: 저탄소 열, 스팀, 또는 냉방 소비한 (MWh)

guidance.textKo: 전년 대비 변경사항은 2026 CDP 원문 및 변경 추적표 기준으로 확인하십시오.

guidance.text: This question only appears if you report a figure greater than zero in column "MWh from renewable sources" in rows "Consumption of purchased or acquired heat" OR "Consumption of purchased or acquired steam" OR "Consumption of purchased or acquired cooling" of 7.30.1.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항 응답에 필요한 추가 작성 기준을 설명합니다. 응답방법과 선택지를 함께 확인하여 작성하십시오.

guidance.text:
General 
Data and information you provide should be for the reporting year only (as defined by your answer to 1.4). 
Sourcing method (column 1) 
Different sourcing methods in the same country/area should be reported in separate rows.
If you select "Other, please specify" to report a sourcing method not listed here, provide more information on the sourcing method used in the "Comment" column (column 6).
Country/area of consumption of the low-carbon heat, steam, or cooling (column 2) 
Select the country/area where the purchased heat, steam, or cooling has been consumed. 
You should add multiple rows per country/area if you have used multiple energy carriers or technology types in the same country/area in the reporting year. 
Low-carbon technology type (column 4) 
If you select the option "Sustainable biomass", provide the criteria used to classify the biomass as sustainable (e.g. certification) in the "Comment" column (column 6). Please refer to the CDP Technical note on Biofuels for guidance on biomass/biofuel sustainability. 
If you select either biomass option, specify in column 6 "Comment" if the biomass technology type refers to bioenergy plants fitted with carbon capture and storage (BECCS). 
Comment (column 6) (optional) 
If you select the option "Sustainable biomass" in column "Low-carbon technology type" (column 4), provide the criteria used to classify the biomass as sustainable (e.g. certification). 
If you select either biomass option in column "Low-carbon technology type" (column 4), specify if the biomass technology type refers to bioenergy plants fitted with carbon capture and storage (BECCS).
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 해당 문항에서 CDP가 요청하는 작성 내용을 설명합니다. 위 응답방법, 열 구조, 드롭다운 선택지를 기준으로 보고연도와 조직 범위에 맞는 정보를 입력하십시오.

guidance.text: Companies procure, heat, steam and/or cooling from low-carbon technology types.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항 응답에 필요한 추가 작성 기준을 설명합니다. 응답방법과 선택지를 함께 확인하여 작성하십시오.

guidance.text:
Low-carbon energy : in line with the IEA definition, low-carbon technologies are technologies that produce low - or zero - greenhouse-gas emissions while operating. In the power sector this includes fossil-fuel plants fitted with carbon capture and storage, nuclear plants and renewable-based generation technologies. Natural gas, combined cycle gas turbine and fossil fuel-based combined heat and power (cogeneration), despite being less carbon intensive than other means of electricity production like coal, are not considered low-carbon.
Biomass : any organic matter, i.e. biological material, available on a renewable basis. Includes feedstock derived from animals or plants, such as wood and agricultural crops, and organic waste from municipal and industrial sources. Biomass fuels should be sustainably sourced and certified where possible, and include:
- Solid biofuels - solid fuels derived from biomass. Includes feedstock derived from animals or plants, such as wood and agricultural crops, and organic waste from municipal and industrial sources.
- Biogas - a mixture of methane (CH4) and carbon dioxide (CO2) used as fuel and produced by bacterial degradation of organic matter or through gasification of biomass.
- Liquid biofuels - liquid fuels derived from biomass such as ethanol and biodiesel.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항에서 사용하는 주요 용어의 의미를 설명합니다. 용어 해석은 CDP 2026 원문과 국문 양식의 용어 사용을 우선 적용하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of rows disclosed. Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 5/5 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 점 부여됨 마다 완료 셀 비례 숫자 입력 의 행 공시된. 부분적으로 완료된 행은 최고점을 받을 수 없습니다. 이 문항에서 최대 5/5점을 받을 수 있습니다.

criteria.criteria:
Full Disclosure points must be awarded to be eligible for Awareness points.
Table completed - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 인지 점수수수 대상이 되려면 공시 점수수수를 모두 획득해야 합니다. 표 완료 - 1 점 이 문항에서 최대 1/1점을 받을 수 있습니다.

criteria.criteria:
Full Awareness points must be awarded to be eligible for Management points.
Any option excluding ‘Other biomass' AND ‘Other, please specify' selected in column 'Low-carbon technology type'- 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
Full Awareness points awarded AND sum of figures provided in column 'Low-carbon heat, steam, or cooling consumed (MWh)' is greater than 10% of the sum of figures provided in column 'Total...' in question 7.30.1 in the following rows: - 1 point
- 'Consumption of purchased or acquired heat'
- 'Consumption of purchased or acquired steam'
- 'Consumption of purchased or acquired cooling'
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this question.

criteria.criteriaKo: 점 부여됨 마다 완료 셀 비례 숫자 입력 의 행 공시된. 부분적으로 완료된 행은 최고점을 받을 수 없습니다. 이 문항에서 최대 5/5점을 받을 수 있습니다.

change.question_ko: 보고 연도에 귀사의 재생 가능 전력 구매에 대한 국가/지역별 세부 정보를 제공하십시오
change.q2025_text: Provide details of your organization's low-carbon heat, steam, and cooling purchases in the reporting year by country/area.
change.detail_change_types: Remove tags to question, Revised question dependency, Change to question order/number, Add tags to question, Removed dropdown option, Change to conditional logic, Modified guidance, New dropdown option, Modified dropdown option, Change to conditional logic, Modified guidance
change.change_summary:
Conditional logic change - question now appears to all responders rather than for RE100 responders only. Question dependency - question now appears to financial services organizations that are RE100 organizations. Question does not appear to Electric Utilities.
Removed dropdown option 'None..'.
Conditional logic removed - due to question dependency updates and the removal of column "Sourcing method". New dropdown option "Kosovo" and several minor edits to country/area names.

sectorTagsKo: 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 OEM - EPM, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, 농산물 원자재, 운송 OEM, 시멘트, 식품, 음료 & 담배, 제지 및 임업, 부동산, 건설
simpleHelpKo: 이 문항은 '보고 연도에 귀사의 재생 가능 전력 구매에 대한 국가/지역별 세부 정보를 제공하십시오'에 대한 배경 설명입니다. CDP 응답자는 보고연도 기준으로 조직의 환경 관련 현황, 리스크, 기회, 성과 또는 관리체계를 문항의 응답 구조에 맞춰 설명해야 합니다.
